children.label: A
children.text: is separated from employment as a military reserve technician by reason of a disability that disqualifies the individual from membership in a reserve component of the Armed Forces specified in or from holding the military grade required for such employment;section 10101 of title 10

children.label: B
children.text: is not considered to be disabled under section 8451(a)(1)(B);

children.label: C
children.text: is not appointed to a position in the Government (whether under subsection (b) or otherwise); and

children.label: D
children.text: has not declined an offer of an appointment to a position in the Government under subsection (b).

children.label: A
children.text: on the date the individual is appointed to a position in the Government (whether pursuant to subsection (b) or otherwise);

children.label: B
children.text: on the date the individual declines an offer of appointment to a position in the Government under subsection (b); or
An individual eligible to retire under section 8414(c) shall not be eligible to retire under this section.
the position is located within the commuting area of the individual’s former position;
the individual is qualified to serve in such position, as determined by the head of the agency; and
the position is at the same grade or equivalent level as the position from which the individual was separated.
